grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to use System at specified location under Brand
grant_and_term.term_new_construction: 23 years from Effective Date (end of month)
grant_and_term.renewal: None. Non-renewable franchise. Re-licensing at franchisor's sole discretion with potentially materially different terms.

fee_obligations.monthly_royalty: 5% of GRR, due 15th of following month
fee_obligations.monthly_fb_fee: 3% of GFBR, due 15th of following month
fee_obligations.monthly_program_fee: 4% of GRR (cap: current + 1% over term), due 15th of following month
fee_obligations.spa_royalty: 2% of GSR (if Eforea Spa Amendment in effect)
fee_obligations.electronic_transfer: Franchisor may require wire transfer/ACH for all payments; franchisee bears costs
fee_obligations.offset_right: Franchisor may reduce any payment/credit by amounts franchisee owes

site_selection_and_construction.new_dev_start: Must start construction within 16 months of application approval
site_selection_and_construction.new_dev_complete: Must complete and open within 36 months of approval
site_selection_and_construction.conversion: Deadlines per PIP on project-by-project basis
site_selection_and_construction.architect_approval: Must obtain prior written consent for architect, interior designer, general contractor, major subcontractors
site_selection_and_construction.plan_approval: Must obtain approval before starting construction; no changes without advance consent
site_selection_and_construction.ada_compliance: Architect/contractor must certify ADA compliance; ADA survey may be required
site_selection_and_construction.auto_extensions: 30-day rolling extensions for new dev/conversion unless 60-day notice to stop

training_obligations.gm_training: Required for all new GMs within 90 days; up to $1,200
training_obligations.sales_training: Required for Dir of Sales and sales managers within 90 days; up to $600
training_obligations.brand_conference: Required annually for GM and Dir of Sales; $2,500/attendee
training_obligations.owner_orientation: Required 12–18 months before opening for new franchisees
training_obligations.ongoing: Various mandatory programs; franchisee bears wages, travel, lodging

operational_obligations.24_7_operations: Must operate 24 hours/day every day (exceptions possible)
operational_obligations.management: Must use approved management (self or approved Management Company)
operational_obligations.standards_compliance: Must comply with Standards/Manual at all times; franchisor may change at any time
operational_obligations.reservation_service: Must use exclusively for outgoing referrals; must honor all confirmed reservations
operational_obligations.quality_assurance: Subject to evaluations, re-evaluations, Special Audits
operational_obligations.renovation: Must maintain/replace/modernize per FRCM schedule and Standards
operational_obligations.hilton_honors: Mandatory participation including free night room allocation

non_curable_immediate: Failure to operate 5+ consecutive days (not Force Majeure)
termination_triggers.interim_remedies: Reservation Service suspension, directory removal, software disablement, financial accommodation revocation

transfer_restrictions.permitted_without_consent: Public equity, <50% private equity (no control change), designated institutional fund transfers
transfer_restrictions.permitted_with_consent: Affiliate transfers, family/trust transfers, death transfers, >50% cumulative private equity — 60-day notice + $5,500 fee
transfer_restrictions.coo_transfer: $150,000 fee, 60-day notice, current FA, PIP compliance, transferee qualifications, guaranty
transfer_restrictions.right_of_first_offer: 30 days on unsolicited bona fide offers
transfer_restrictions.mortgage_pledge: Without consent if sole borrower + hotel-only collateral; otherwise consent required

noncompete.during_term: May not own/be licensor/franchisor of competing brand. Exceptions: minority interest in competitor, franchisee of competitor, manage competitor property.

guaranty.scope: Required guarantors (may include spouse) must sign Guaranty assuming and agreeing to discharge certain FA obligations
guaranty.third_party_guaranty: May be required for lender comfort letters, certain loans, or upon default notice

liquidated_damages.pre_opening: System avg monthly royalty × 60 (if terminate before open and you build/operate another hotel at site within 1 year)
liquidated_damages.post_opening_pre_2yr: Greater of Hotel or System avg monthly royalty × 60
liquidated_damages.last_60mo: Hotel avg monthly royalty × months remaining

dispute_resolution.forum: US District Court, Eastern District of VA; or Fairfax County VA / NY, NY. Franchisor may sue at hotel location.
dispute_resolution.jury_waiver: Not explicitly stated in Item 17 but referenced in state addenda

insurance.requirement: Minimum levels/types per Manual; specified insurers with minimum ratings; named additional insureds per Manual
insurance.failure_consequence: Franchisor may purchase and charge to franchisee

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must indemnify, hold harmless, and defend franchisor, Hilton Worldwide, all affiliates, subsidiaries, officers, directors, employees, agents, successors, assigns
indemnification.trigger: Any claim, demand, tax, penalty, or proceeding arising from any claimed occurrence at the hotel
indemnification.no_mitigation_required: Indemnified parties not required to seek recovery from third parties or mitigate losses

force_majeure.casualty: If hotel damaged, may repair/rebuild per Standards within 18 months. If elect not to repair, franchisor may terminate without liquidated damages (if no competitor at site for 3 years).
force_majeure.condemnation: Franchisor may terminate on notice, no liquidated damages

distinctive_clauses.no_renewal_right: Explicitly non-renewable franchise — unusual for hotel industry
distinctive_clauses.independent_contractor: Detailed acknowledgment that franchisor does not direct, supervise, or control labor/employment matters; not a joint employer
distinctive_clauses.information_ownership: All guest/hotel information is franchisor's property; may use for any purpose including FPR in future FDDs
distinctive_clauses.system_modification: No limit on franchisor's right to modify System, Standards, Manual — franchisee must comply with all changes at own cost
distinctive_clauses.cross_default: Termination of any Hotel Agreement triggers non-curable default of FA
distinctive_clauses.competitor_restriction: Franchisee may not be a Competitor (owner/licensor/franchisor of competing brand) — broader than typical noncompete
